_notes: bokun_tracking_code is the long hex string Bokun auto-generates for each referral entry. Find it in Bokun extranet → Settings → Referral tracking → Tracking code column. The slug ('code' field) is what we put in URLs (?hotel=fairmont-ll); the worker looks up bokun_tracking_code from this file at submit time and forwards it to Bokun for attribution. Edit this file and redeploy when adding a new partner — no QR-code reprint required.

hotels.name: Fairmont Chateau Lake Louise
